data.title: Coinbase steers clear of Bitcoin bet, balancing ambition with prudence
data.description:
10-5-2025 – Brian Armstrong, the co-founder and chief executive of Coinbase Global Inc. , the United States’ foremost cryptocurrency exchange, disclosed that the company once grappled with the allure of plunging heavily into Bitcoin, inspired by the audacious strategy championed by Michael Saylor. Speaking during a video discussion on the X social network on Friday, Armstrong [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/coinbase-steers-clear-of-bitcoin-bet-balancing-ambition-with-prudence/

data.title: Coinbase CEO: I considered adopting Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin investment strategy, but ultimately did not adopt it because the risk was too high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase had considered adopting the Bitcoin buying strategy popularized by Michael Saylor in the past, but believed that the plan was too risky. "We have indeed had such a moment in the past 12 years, whether we should put 80% of our assets into cryptocurrencies-specifically Bitcoin," said Brian Armstrong, CEO of Coinbase, in a video speech on the X social network. Coinbase ultimately decided to abandon this strategy because it could damage the company's cash position as a startup and could even "kill" the San Francisco-based company. Despite this, according to the company's latest shareholder letter, Coinbase purchased $153 million worth of cryptocurrencies (mainly Bitcoin) in the first quarter. According to the letter, the company holds $1.3 billion worth of cryptocurrencies (mainly Bitcoin) as investments. (Bloomberg)

data.title: A PEPE whale transferred 500 billion PEPE to Binance 1 hour ago
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst Yu Jin, the whale address starting with 0x3c9 transferred 500 billion PEPE (worth about 6.14 million US dollars) to Binance 1 hour ago. 
Currently, there are still 1.5 trillion PEPE in this address, worth about 12.32 million US dollars.

data.title: Fidelity Sees Significant Inflow in Bitcoin Fund
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported a net inflow of $45 million into Fidelity's Bitcoin fund (FBTC) yesterday. Meanwhile, the net inflow/outflow for Fidelity's Ethereum fund (FETH) remained at zero.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Sees Mixed Results as Tesla Surges
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. stock market closed with mixed results on Friday. The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a preliminary decline of 0.29%, while the S&P 500 Index fell by 0.07%. The Nasdaq Composite Index remained unchanged at the close. Among individual stocks, Tesla saw a significant increase of 4.7%, Apple rose by 0.5%, and Nvidia experienced a slight decrease of 0.6%.

data.title: Optimism Activates Isthmus Hard Fork to Integrate Ethereum Pectra Features
data.description: According to Odaily, Optimism announced on the X platform that it has successfully activated the Isthmus hard fork, incorporating key features from Ethereum's Pectra upgrade into the OP Stack and Superchain. This upgrade occurred just two days after Pectra's launch on the Ethereum mainnet, making Superchain the first Layer 2 ecosystem to support the Pectra upgrade. The update includes enhancements for Base, Ink, OP Mainnet, Soneium, Unichain, and several other OP Stack chains.

data.title: Resolv: All airdrops in the first quarter were allocated to users, and the team and investors locked their positions during TGE.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Resolv Foundation said on the X platform that the team is actively monitoring the airdrop registration dynamics and ensuring that the registration time is sufficient. Among them, the first quarter airdrop tokens accounting for 10% of the total supply will be distributed to users, and unclaimed tokens will enter the second quarter and reward users who actively participate in RESOLV staking. The team and investors did not unlock the tokens at the TGE, and cannot stake the unlocked tokens.

data.title: Criminal Groups Allegedly Target Bank of America, Capital One and Wells Fargo Customers, Steal $155,000 in Brutal Robbery Scheme: Report
data.description:
Customers at several of the largest banks in the US are reportedly victims of a ruthless robbery scheme, according to a new report. Members of two criminal organizations in Maryland have been charged with participating in a criminal gang, attempted murder, armed carjacking, armed robbery, assault and firearms-related counts, reports WMAR 2 News.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/09/criminal-groups-target-bank-of-america-capital-one-and-wells-fargo-customers-in-brutal-bank-robbery-scheme-report/

data.title: Optimism: Activated Isthmus Hard Fork, Bringing Ethereum Pectra Upgrade to Superchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Optimism published a post on the X platform stating that it has successfully activated the Isthmus hard fork, introducing key features in the Ethereum Pectra upgrade to OP Stack and Superchain. This upgrade was only two days after Pectra went live on the Ethereum mainnet, and Superchain is the first L2 ecosystem to support the Pectra upgrade. This upgrade covers Base, Ink, OP Mainnet, Soneium, Unichain, and several other OP Stack chains.

data.title: US Vice President Vance to Speak at Bitcoin 2025 Conference
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Bitcoin Magazine published an article on the X platform stating that US Vice President Vance will deliver a speech at the Bitcoin 2025 Conference, which will be held in Las Vegas from May 27 to 29, 2025.
